differential_diagnoses: Severe community-acquired bacterial pneumonia with multi-organ failure
next_steps: Obtain respiratory tract specimen for Legionella culture and PCR
Initiate empiric coverage for Legionella (e.g., fluoroquinolones like levofloxacin)
Urgent nephrology consultation for consideration of continuous renal replacement therapy (CRRT)
Monitor urine output and volume status closely to manage acute kidney injury
Perform lumbar puncture if mental status does not improve with metabolic correction
Measure serum aldolase, ANA, and myositis-specific antibody panel

differential_diagnoses: Severe community-acquired pneumonia with sepsis-associated rhabdomyolysis
Antisynthetase syndrome presenting with acute interstitial lung disease and myositis
Toxic rhabdomyolysis due to supplement contaminants
next_steps: Send Legionella urinary antigen and respiratory PCR/culture
Consult nephrology for urgent initiation of continuous renal replacement therapy
Escalate antibiotic coverage to include agents active against Legionella (e.g., fluoroquinolones like levofloxacin)
Perform urinalysis to evaluate for myoglobinuria
Measure serum aldolase, ANA, and myositis-specific antibody panel
Maintain close monitoring of fluid status, electrolytes, and urine output in an ICU setting
Consider infectious disease consultation for evaluation of atypical exposures
